name: Garlic & Parmesan Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the pot with corn oil and olive oil over high heat until the oil smokes.
2. Add 1 minced garlic clove to the popcorn and heat until the kernels pop.
3. Add the remaining popping corn, cover, and gently shake until the popping slows down.
4. Remove from heat and immediately remove the lid.
5. Toss the popcorn with Parmesan cheese, cayenne, and salt.
